title: ReviewFindings
description: Output schema for PR review perspective sub-agents (security, maintainability, performance, quality). Each agent returns an object matching this schema.

severity.description: Impact level: CRITICAL=blocking, MAJOR=important, MINOR=polish, INFO=FYI

source.description: Sub-agent perspective (e.g. 'security-reviewer') or GitHub reviewer login

file.description: Workspace-relative file path, or null when finding is not file-specific

line.description: 1-based line number in the file, or null

finding.description: Concise description of the issue found

recommendation.description: Concrete action to resolve the finding
